description.ko: 파열된 신호들이 긴장감 있는 기하학적 질서로 맞물리는 흑백 전송장.
description.en: A monochrome transmission field where fractured signals snap into a tense geometric order.

prompt: KURO-X monochrome geometric glitch abstraction: a full-frame black and white transmission chamber formed from nested angular apertures, offset isometric grids, serrated diagonal braces, and fractured rectangular waveforms. #1A1A1A planes press inward from the edges while #FFFFFF void slits cut through the center like overexposed signal gaps; #808080 and #C0C0C0 fragments appear as misregistered calibration plates, broken timecode ticks, and fast square particle bursts. Dense horizontal scanlines, vertical sync tearing, hard compression steps, bit-crushed checker patterns, and razor-thin moire bands make the image feel violently refreshed, but every shard remains locked into a precise invisible lattice. No figure, no logo, no floating object: only sharp angles, monochrome complexity, intense contrast, cold digital depth, and chaos held in perfect geometric balance.
